explanations.executive_summary: Pre-upgrade risk assessment (model v1.0.0): overall recommendation is BLOCK with a composite score of 75/100 across 7 CVE(s) (1 BLOCK, 5 REVIEW).

per_cve.paragraph: CVE-2018-18074 scores 75/100 (BLOCK). CVSS 7.5 contributes 30 severity points. The /auth.py entry point reaches `requests.sessions.rebuild_auth` in auth.py:10 via a 2-hop call-graph path. Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.55 and listed in CISA KEV catalog. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2020-14343 scores 69/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 9.8 contributes 39 severity points. Transitive exposure: package pyyaml affected, no code path Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.65 and listed in CISA KEV catalog. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2018-1000656 scores 63/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 7.5 contributes 30 severity points. The //api/data entry point reaches `api_data` in app.py:27 via a 1-hop call-graph path. Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.12. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2019-8341 scores 58/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 8.1 contributes 32 severity points. Transitive exposure: package jinja2 affected, no code path Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.48 and listed in CISA KEV catalog. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2019-11324 scores 48/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 7.5 contributes 30 severity points. Transitive exposure: package urllib3 affected, no code path Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.22. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2018-10903 scores 44/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 7.5 contributes 30 severity points. Transitive exposure: package cryptography affected, no code path Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.03. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2019-1010083 scores 31/100 (PROCEED). CVSS 4.3 contributes 17 severity points. Transitive exposure: package flask affected, no code path Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.08. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

references.code_snippet:
7 | # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
       8 | #
       9 | from requests import Session
>>>   10 | from requests.utils import rebuild_auth
      11 | 
      12 | auth_bp = Blueprint("auth", __name__)
      13 |

39 |     session = Session()
      40 |     prepared = session.prepare_request(request)
      41 |     # Vulnerable pattern: uses patched rebuild_auth on redirect chain
>>>   42 |     prepared.headers = rebuild_auth(prepared, _build_redirect_response())
      43 |     return jsonify({"status": "ok", "user": request.form.get("username", "")})

report_data.next_action: Upgrade boto3 → 1.26.0, then cryptography → 2.3, then requests → 2.20.0. Test affected endpoints.

overall.headline: Pre-upgrade risk assessment (model v1.0.0): overall recommendation is BLOCK with a composite score of 75/100 across 7 CVE(s) (1 BLOCK, 5 REVIEW).

top_concerns.detail: BLOCK (75/100). Symbol requests.sessions.rebuild_auth; reachable at auth.py.
top_concerns.title: requests — CVE-2018-18074

conflicts.human_explanation: Packages requests, cryptography impose incompatible version ranges on idna; resolved idna 3.15.0 violates at least one constraint.
Packages botocore, requests impose incompatible version ranges on urllib3; resolved urllib3 1.25.11 violates at least one constraint.

estimated_test_surface.recommendation: Run integration tests for code paths using upgraded packages and shared dependencies (e.g. urllib3, boto3 sessions).

steps.reason: Latest version that relaxes shared-deps before requests upgrade.
Latest version that relaxes shared-deps before requests upgrade.

summary.headline: Upgrade blocked as requested: requires upgrading boto3 first.
summary.one_line: BLOCKED. Cascade required: 4 packages must be upgraded in order.

target_introduces_cves.note: Requests vulnerable to .netrc credentials leak via malicious URLs
Requests `Session` object does not verify requests after making first request with verify=False
Requests has Insecure Temp File Reuse in its extract_zipped_paths() utility function
Unintended leak of Proxy-Authorization header in requests

reachable_paths.note: package pyyaml affected, no code path
package jinja2 affected, no code path
package urllib3 affected, no code path
package cryptography affected, no code path
package flask affected, no code path
